response.justification: While the candidate has broad full-stack experience and some exposure to AI-agent tooling, they lack demonstrated production leadership in multi-agent AI systems for fintech, have no evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people, and show no experience in regulated financial infrastructure, credit risk, or real-time trading systems — all core requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling at re:cinq
Strong backend and distributed systems exposure via microservices and real-time data work
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of 5+ years in senior technical leadership at scale-ups
Zero demonstrated experience in fintech, credit systems, or regulated AI deployment
Lacks proven track record scaling teams to 30+ or governing hybrid external engineering models
